description_long: This motorcycle features a futuristic, angular design with a metallic orange and gold color scheme. The body is composed of sharp, geometric panels, with a streamlined tail section and a compact, aggressive front fairing. The wheels are large and gold-colored, with a visible disc brake system on the front and a chain drive on the rear. The seat is narrow and tapers towards the back, while the handlebars are straight and positioned for a sporty riding posture. The engine and mechanical components are partially exposed, emphasizing a high-performance aesthetic. The overall appearance suggests a custom or concept motorcycle designed for urban environments.
description: A futuristic, angular motorcycle with metallic orange and gold panels, exposed mechanical parts, and a streamlined, sporty design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, angular bodywork, gold wheels, and exposed engine components.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow, aggressive front fairing, straight handlebars, and single headlight area.
description_view_2: Angled side view emphasizing the seat, tail section, and the detailed structure of the frame and wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tapered seat, dual exhausts, and the wide rear tire.
